extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: for the company, “By our Company” has 1 criminal matter and ₹0.87 million, while “Against our Company” has Nil criminal, 15 tax and Nil statutory/regulatory matters with ₹16.73 million; director and promoter against-rows are all Nil, and all “By” rows are excluded. Thus, criminal against-count is 0, regulatory against-count is 0, tax against-count is 15, and the quantified company-group amount is ₹16.73 million; the footnoted ₹100.04 million customs payment under protest is excluded from the table’s tax proceedings and is not added. The contingent-liabilities table is as of September 30, 2024 and is stated in ₹ million, but it has no disclosed Total row, so no total is extracted rather than summing line items. The company-wide concentration disclosed is the ten largest dealers’ 50.51% of revenue from operations for Financial Year 2024; no company-wide top-five percentage is given (the 85.13% SLCM figure is product concentration, not customer concentration). The source unit is million; ₹16.73 million converts to ₹1.673 crore using 1 crore = ₹10 million.
